post.description:
Save or update the FCM device token for the logged-in user.
Required field in .env  : (none — uses firebase-service-account.json)
Required in settings.py : FCM_DJANGO_SETTINGS
Send a login success push notification to the current user.

Send a notification to a specific user by user_id.
Saves the notification to the DB and sends a FCM push notification.

Required IDs / keys (add to .env):
  - Firebase service account JSON file at  credentials/firebase-service-account.json
  - FCM_DJANGO_SETTINGS block in settings.py  (see settings note below)

get.description:
Returns all notifications for the currently authenticated user,
newest first.

patch.description: Mark a specific notification as read for the logged-in user.
Bulk mark all notifications as read for the logged-in user.

get.description:
Get popular services/businesses near the user's current location.

Query Parameters:
- latitude: User's current latitude (required)
- longitude: User's current longitude (required)
- radius: Search radius in kilometers (default: 10km)
- category_id: Filter by category ID (optional)
- limit: Maximum number of results to return (default: 50)

Returns: List of verified businesses sorted by distance (closest first)

Get most searched categories with their top business listings.

Query Parameters:
- limit: Number of popular categories to return

Returns:
- Category details
- Search count
- Number of verified listings
- Top 5 verified business listings

List all active "Why Choose Us" items with icons.
Returns: List of WhyChooseUss items ordered by newest first.
Retrieves the latest active version of the Terms & Conditions.
Retrieves the latest active version of the Privacy Policy.
